shows.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup
shows.description: Portugal vs. Uzbekistan in a Group K match in Houston, Texas. Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal look to make up ground in the group after a lackluster 1-1 draw with DR Congo to open, with the 42-year-old legend managing only 25 touches (and three wayward shots). Uzbekistan goalkeeper Utkir Yusupov should be tested again after letting three of four on-target shots find the net vs. Colombia.
